name: invoice-expense
description: Turn invoice data into a reimbursement table from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Build a reimbursement table from invoice data.
interface.longDescription: Invoice Expense adds a reusable Codex skill for converting invoice fields into a reimbursement table, with a small local demo script for CSV or JSON inputs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use invoice-expense to turn invoice data into a reimbursement table.
